trait.name: Earth Climb
entries: Can climb difficult earth or stone surfaces including upside down on ceilings with o an ability check.

trait.name: Earth Glide
entries: Can burrow through nonmagical unworked earth/stone with o disturbing material it moves through.

trait.name: Earthen Claws
entries: Its claws easily meld through stone and metal. When it makes a Claw attack vs. creature wearing nonmagical metal armor or wielding a nonmagical metal shield attack ignores AC bonus of armor or shield. If target is a construct made of stone or metal attack ignores AC bonus provided by natural armor if any.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: Advantage on attacks vs. creature if 1+ unincapacitated attacker ally is within 5 ft. of target.

trait.name: Stone Camouflage
entries: Advantage: Dex (Stealth) to hide in rocky terrain.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: One Bite attack and two Claw attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit 5 ft reach one target 10 (2d6+3) piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit 5 ft one target 8 (2d4+3) slashing damage.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: Can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Advantage: spell/magic effect saves.

trait.name: Polluted Aura
entries: Each creature in same water as hag and that starts its turn within 20' of hag: poisoned while within aura and for 1 min after it leaves (DC 16 Con not poisoned). A poisoned creature that starts its turn outside aura can re-save success ends effect on itself.

trait.name: Skilled Submariner
entries: Advantage on Wis (Perception) and Wis (Survival) checks to find creatures and objects underwater. Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) checks made to hide while underwater.

trait.name: Speak with Aquatic Creatures
entries: Communicate with Beasts and Monstrosities that have a swimming speed as if they shared a language.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Two Claw attacks and one Tail Slap attack.

action.name: Claw
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 12 (2d8+3) slashing damage + 7 (2d6) poison. Target incapacitated until the end of its next turn (DC 16 Con not incapacitated). If it fails the save by 5+ it is paralyzed instead.

action.name: Tail Slap
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 16 (2d12 +3) bludgeoning damage and target must make DC 16 Str save or pushed up to 10 ft. away from the hag.

action.name: Shriek (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Unleashes a painful screeching in a 30' cone. Each creature in the area: 33 (6d10) thunder and is stunned until the end of its next turn (DC 16 Con half damage and isn't stunned).

action.name: Denizens of the Deep (1/Day)
entries: Magically calls 4 reef sharks 2 swarms of quippers or 1 Beast of up to CR 2 with swim speed. Arrive in 1d4 rounds act as hag allies obeying her spoken commands. Beasts stay 1 hr until hag dies or until hag dismisses them as bonus action.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: Cha (DC 16) no material components: At will: minor illusion  • 3/day ea: charm person major image1/day: control water

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: Can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Ice Walk
entries: Can move across and climb icy surfaces with o ability check. Difficult terrain covered in ice or snow doesn't cost her extra move.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Two Claw attacks or three Ice Bolt attacks.

action.name: Claw
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 8 (1d8+4) slashing damage + 10 (3d6) cold and target is grappled (escape DC 15) if hag doesn't have another creature grappled.

action.name: Ice Bolt
entries: Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, 60 ft., one target, 12 (3d6+2) cold.

action.name: Stash
entries: Stashes a Med or smaller creature grappled by her or that is incapacitated within 5 ft. of her inside extradimensional pocket in her parka ending grappled/incapacitated condition. Extradimensional pocket can hold only one creature at a time. While inside pocket creature blinded and restrained and has total cover vs. attacks and other effects outside pocket. Trapped creature can use action to escape pocket via DC 15 Str check and using 5 ft. of move falling prone in unoccupied space within 5 ft. of hag. If hag dies trapped creature is freed appearing in unoccupied space within 5 ft. of hag's body.

action.name: Distracting Knock (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Raps her knuckles on the ice creating a magical echoing knock. Each creature within 30' of the hag: 21 (6d6) psychic and is incapacitated for 1 min (DC 15 Wis half damage and isn't incapacitated). While incapacitated creature moves toward hag by safest available route on each of its turns unless there is nowhere to move. An incapacitated creature can re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: Cha (DC 13) no material components: At will: minor illusion prestidigitation3/day ea: fog cloud sleep1/day: sleet storm

trait.name: Disease Sense
entries: Can pinpoint location of poisoned creatures or creatures suffering from a disease within 60' of her and can sense general direction of such creatures within 1 mile of her.

trait.name: Pestilence Aura
entries: At start of each of hag's turns each creature within 10 ft. of her takes 4 (1d8) poison. If a creature remains within aura for more than 1 min it contracts disease of hag's choice (DC 13 Con negates disease). Disease's save DC is 13 regardless of type.

trait.name: Plague Carrier
entries: The pesta hag is immune to diseases.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Two Pestilence Rake or Poison Bolt attacks.

action.name: Pestilence Rake
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 7 (1d8+3) piercing damage + 5 (2d4) necrotic. Target: DC 13 Con save or its hp max is reduced by amount equal to necrotic taken and it contracts sewer plague sight rot or other disease of hag's choice. Disease's save DC 13 regardless of type.

action.name: Poison Bolt
entries: Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, 120 ft., one target, 12 (2d8+3) poison.

action.name: Curative Touch (3/Day)
entries: Touched target magically regains 10 (2d8+1) hp and freed from any disease or poison afflicting it.

action.name: Summon Plague Rats (1/Day)
entries: Magically calls 1d3 rat swarms. Arrive in 1d4 rounds act as hag allies and obey her spoken commands. Swarms carry a terrible disease. If creature takes damage from swarm's Bites: DC 10 Con save or contract the disease. Until disease is cured creature can't regain hp except by magically and target's hp max decreases by 3 (1d6) every 24 hrs. If creature's hp max drops to 0 as a result of this disease it dies. Rats remain 1 hr until hag dies or hag dismisses them as bonus action.

trait.name: One with the Woods
entries: While hag remains motionless in forest terrain is indistinguishable from an old decomposing log or tree stump.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: Advantage: spell/magic effect saves.

trait.name: Speak with Beasts and Plants
entries: Can communicate with Beasts and Plants as if they shared a language.

trait.name: Woodland Walk
entries: Difficult terrain made of plants doesn't cost hag extra move. Can pass through plants with o being slowed by them nor taking damage from them if they have thorns spines or similar.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Two Claw or Toxic Splinter attacks.

action.name: Claw
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 10 (2d6+3) slashing damage + 18 (4d8) poison.

action.name: Toxic Splinter
entries: Ranged Spell Attack: +9 to hit, 60 ft., one target, 7 (1d4+5) piercing damage + 18 (4d8) poison and poisoned 1 min (DC 16 Con negates). Effect: target paralyzed. Victim can re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself. A creature within 5 ft. of target can take its action to remove splinter with DC 13 Wis (Medicine) check ending poisoned condition.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries: Wis (DC 17) no material components: At will: charm person entangle  • 3/day: plant growth1/day: contagion

monster.name: Hair Golem
languages: understands the languages of its creator but can't speak

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The golem is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

action.name: Lash
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) slashing damage. The target must succeed on a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw or be knocked prone.

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The haleshi can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Charming Defense
entries: While the haleshi is wearing no armor and wielding no shield, its AC includes its Charisma modifier (included in the Armor Class).

trait.name: Innate Spellcasting
entries:
The haleshi's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
3/day each: charm person, invisibility (self only)
1/day each: major image, water walk, zone of truth

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The haleshi makes two attacks with its stupefying touch.

action.name: Stupefying Touch
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d8 + 3) psychic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Intelligence saving throw or be incapacitated until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Clamport (3/Day)
entries: The haleshi touches a clam within 5 feet of it, which enlarges and swallows the haleshi and up to three willing Medium or smaller creatures within 15 feet of the haleshi. The clam then teleports to a body of water the haleshi has visited that is large enough to hold the clam's passengers and releases them. After releasing the passengers, the clam returns to normal.

reaction.name: Water Shield (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The haleshi adds 3 to its AC against one attack that would hit it. To do so, the haleshi must be within 5 feet of a gallon or more of water. Alternatively, if the haleshi would take fire damage from an attack or spell, it can negate that damage if it is within 5 feet of a gallon or more of water.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries:
The haleshi's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
3/day each: charm person, invisibility (self only)
1/day each: major image, water walk, zone of truth

monster.name: Half-Red Dragon Veteran
senses: blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 12

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The veteran makes two longsword attacks. If it has a shortsword drawn, it can also make a shortsword attack.

action.name: Longsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage, or 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage if used with two hands.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.

action.name: Heavy Crossbow
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d10 + 1) piercing damage.

action.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The veteran exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 24 (7d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

monster.name: Half-Red Dragon Veteran
senses: blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 12

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The veteran makes two melee attacks.

action.name: Longsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.

action.name: Heavy Crossbow
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d10 + 1) piercing damage.

action.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The veteran exhales a blast of fire that fills a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area makes a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw  taking 24 (7d6) fire damage on a failed save or half damage on a success. A creature who fails the saving throw also suffers 5 (1d10) ongoing fire damage. At the end of each of its turns  it can repeat the saving throw  ending the ongoing damage on a success. This fire can also be put out in typical ways  such as immersion in water  and a creature who uses an action to drop prone can put out the fire with a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw.

reaction.name: Off-Hand Counter
entries: When the veteran is missed by a melee attack by an attacker it can see within 5 feet, the veteran makes a shortsword attack against the attacker.

monster.name: Half-Shadow Dragon Assassin
senses: blindsight 10 ft., darkvision 60 ft., passive Perception 14

trait.name: Assassinate
entries: During the first turn of combat, the assassin has advantage on attack rolls against any creature that hasnt acted. On a successful hit, each creature of the assassins choice that can see the assassins attack is rattled until the end of the assassins next turn.

trait.name: Dangerous Poison
entries: As part of making an attack, the assassin can apply a dangerous poison to their weapon (included below). The assassin carries 3 doses of this poison. A single dose can coat one melee weapon or up to 5 pieces of ammunition.

trait.name: Evasion
entries: When the assassin makes a Dexterity saving throw against an effect that deals half damage on a success, they take no damage on a success and half damage on a failure.

trait.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
entries: The assassin deals an extra 21 (6d6) damage when they hit with a weapon attack while they have advantage on the attack, or when the assassins target is within 5 feet of an ally of the assassin while the assassin doesnt have disadvantage on the attack.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

action.name: Hand Crossbow
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) poison damage.

action.name: Anguished Breath (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The assassin exhales a shadowy maelstrom of anguish in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area makes a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw  taking 22 (4d8) necrotic damage on a failed save or half damage on a success.

monster.name: Hallowed Reed
senses: blindsight 30 ft. (blind beyond this radius), passive Perception 14

trait.name: Like Calls to Like
entries: The hallowed reed knows if a creature within 30 feet of it is good-aligned or not.

trait.name: Limited Telepathy
entries: Using telepathy, a hallowed reed can magically communicate with any other good-aligned creature within 100 feet of it. This communication is primarily through images and emotions rather than actual words.

trait.name: Rebirth
entries: If a hallowed reed is slain, a new patch of hallowed reeds will grow in the same spot starting within a week of its death. Charring or salting the ground where a hallowed reed was slain prevents this resurgence.

action.name: Searing Grasp
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 15 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) radiant damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12). Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained, it takes 2 (1d4) radiant damage at the start of each of its turns, and the hallowed reed can't grasp another target. Undead and fiends have disadvantage on ability checks made to escape the grapple.

trait.name: Detachable Head
entries:
As a bonus action, the hantu penanggal detaches its head. The head trails entrails like flexible tentacles. While detached, the head and body act independently from each other on the same initiative, and each has hp equal to half its hp before detaching its head. Its statistics remain the same in both forms, except the body loses its truesight and gains blindsight out to a range of 60 feet.

The head and body can use the whole form's innate spellcasting trait, expending daily uses as normal. The two forms can rejoin into the fiend's whole form as a bonus action if they are within 5 feet of each other. If the head is destroyed while it is detached, the body also perishes. If the body is destroyed while the head is detached, the head has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks until it acquires a new body. A creature within 30 feet of the penanggal and that can see the detachment must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

trait.name: Innate Spellcasting
entries:
The hantu penanggal's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components.
At will: darkness, detect evil and good
2/day each: protection from evil and good, scorching ray
1/day each: gaseous form

action.name: Multiattack
entries: When detached, the hantu penanggal's head makes one bite attack and one entrails attack, and its body makes two claw attacks. In its whole form, it can make three rapier attacks.

action.name: Rapier (Whole Form Only)
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage.

action.name: Claw (Body Only)
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) necrotic damage.

action.name: Bite (Head Only)
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage. The target's hp maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken, and the penanggal regains hp equal to that amount. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hp maximum to 0. A humanoid slain in this way becomes the new body for the penanggal, if it is detached and its body died. Otherwise, the humanoid rises 24 hours later as a new hantu penanggal.

action.name: Entrails (Head Only)
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage and the target is grappled (escape DC 15). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the penanggal can't use its entrails on another target.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries:
The hantu penanggal's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 15, +7 to hit with spell attacks). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components.
At will: darkness, detect evil and good
2/day each: protection from evil and good, scorching ray
1/day each: gaseous form

monster.name: Harbinger of Wrath
languages: understands the languages of its creator but can’t speak

trait.name: Adamantine Weapons
entries: The harbinger's weapon attacks are adamantine and magical.

trait.name: Immutable Form
entries: The harbinger is immune to any spell or effect that would alter its form.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the harbinger fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The harbinger has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The harbinger of wrath makes two slam attacks.

action.name: Slam
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 36 (6d8 + 9) bludgeoning damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 20) if it is a Large or smaller creature and the harbinger doesn't have two other creatures grappled.

action.name: Impale
entries: The harbinger makes one slam attack against a creature it is grappling. If the attack hits, the target is impaled on the harbinger's spikes. While impaled, the creature is restrained and takes 21 (6d6) piercing damage at the start of each of the harbinger's turns. A creature, including the impaled target, can take its action to free the impaled target by succeeding on a DC 20 Strength check. A freed creature falls prone in a space within 10 feet of the harbinger. If the harbinger dies, a creature is no longer restrained and can escape from the harbinger's spikes by using 10 feet of movement.

action.name: Drain Life (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The harbinger drains the life force of one creature impaled on its spikes. The target must succeed on a DC 20 Constitution saving throw or take 55 (10d10) necrotic damage. If a creature dies from this attack, its soul is absorbed into the harbinger and can be restored to life only by means of a wish spell. The harbinger then regains hp equal to the necrotic damage dealt.

action.name: Spike Volley (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The harbinger launches a volley of adamantine spikes. Each creature within 60 feet of the harbinger must make a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw, taking 42 (12d6) piercing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: The harefolk has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Ready for Trouble
entries: The harefolk can't be surprised, and it has advantage on initiative rolls if it isn't incapacitated or unconscious.

trait.name: Shapechanger Sensitivity
entries: The harefolk has advantage on Intelligence (Investigation) and Wisdom (Insight) checks to determine if a creature is a shapechanger. It automatically succeeds when the shapechanger is a werewolf. In addition, the harefolk has advantage on its first attack roll each turn against a creature with the Shapechanger trait or Change Shape action, regardless of whether the harefolk was previously aware of the shapechanger's nature.

trait.name: Snow Camouflage
entries: The harefolk has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in snowy terrain.

trait.name: Snow Walker
entries: The harefolk can move across icy surfaces without needing to make an ability check. Additionally, difficult terrain composed of ice or snow doesn't cost it extra movement.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.

action.name: Shortsword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.

action.name: Sling
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The harpy makes two attacks: one with its claws and one with its club.

action.name: Claws
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (2d4 + 1) slashing damage.

action.name: Club
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Luring Song
entries:
The harpy sings a magical melody. Every humanoid and giant within 300 ft. of the harpy that can hear the song must succeed on a DC 11 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed until the song ends. The harpy must take a bonus action on its subsequent turns to continue singing. It can stop singing at any time. The song ends if the harpy is incapacitated.
While charmed by the harpy, a target is incapacitated and ignores the songs of other harpies. If the charmed target is more than 5 ft. away from the harpy, the must move on its turn toward the harpy by the most direct route. It doesn't avoid opportunity attacks, but before moving into damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit, and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the harpy, a target can repeat the saving throw. A creature can also repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns. If a creature's saving throw is successful, the effect ends on it.
A target that successfully saves is immune to this harpy's song for the next 24 hours.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The harpy attacks twice with its claw.

action.name: Claw
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) slashing damage.

trait.name: Limited Telepathy
entries: Magically transmit simple messages and images to any creature within 90' of it that can understand a language. This telepathy doesn't allow receiver to telepathically respond.

trait.name: Virulence
entries: A creature infected with harpy's plague becomes contagious 24 hrs after contracting the disease. When a creature starts its turn within 5 ft. of contagious target that creature must make DC 15 Con save or also contract harpy's plague disease.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Dirge then 1 Bite and 2 Talons or 3 Sorrowful Caws. If it hits Med or smaller creature with two Talons attacks target grappled (escape DC 15). Until this grapple ends harpy can automatically hit target with its Talons and harpy can't make Talons attacks vs. others.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 8 (2d4+3) piercing damage + 7 (2d6) necrotic. If target is a creature it must make DC 15 Con save or contract harpy's plague disease. If target is disheartened and contracts harpy's plague its hp max is reduced by amount equal to necrotic taken. Until disease is cured target can't regain hp except by magical means and target's hp max decreases by 10 (3d6) every 24 hrs. If target's hp max drops to 0 as a result of this disease target dies.

action.name: Talons
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 14 (2d10+3) slashing damage.

action.name: Sorrowful Caw
entries: Ranged Spell Attack: +6 to hit, 90 ft., one target, 13 (3d6+3) psychic.

action.name: Dirge
entries: Telepathically sings a mournful hymn and projects images of sickly and dying loved ones in mind of one creature it can see within 90' of it. Target: DC 15 Wis save or be disheartened for 1 min. While disheartened creature has disadvantage on saves vs. being poisoned or contracting a disease. Disheartened creature can re-save at end of each of its turns success ends effect on itself.

trait.name: Monstrosity Resilience
entries: The harpy is resistant to exhaustion and to the frightened condition.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The harpy makes two Claw or Screech attacks. If both Screech attacks hit one Giant or Humanoid, the target has disadvantage on the next save it makes against the harpy's Luring Song before the start of the harpy's next turn.

action.name: Claw
entries: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 8 (2d4+3) slashing damage.

action.name: Screech
entries: _Ranged Spell Attack:_ +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 8 (2d6+1) thunder damage.

trait.name: Beast of Burden
entries: Is considered one size larger for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.

trait.name: Construct Nature
entries: Doesn't require air food drink or sleep.

trait.name: Poor Traversal
entries: Must spend two additional feet of movement to move through difficult terrain instead of one additional foot.

trait.name: Siege Monster
entries: Double damage to objects/structures.

action.name: Slam
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 7 (2d4+2) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Harvester's Stampede (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Moves up to its speed in a straight line and can move through the space of any Large or smaller creature. The first time the harvest horse enters a creature's space during this move that creature must make a DC 12 Dex save. On a failure it takes 7 (2d6) slashing damage and is knocked prone. On a success it takes half damage and isn't knocked prone. When the harvest horse moves in this way it doesn't provoke opportunity attacks.

monster.name: Haugbui
languages: the languages it spoke in life; telepathy 120 ft.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The haugbui can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Innate Spellcasting
entries:
the haugbui's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 18). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

constant: detect thoughts, invisibility, mage hand, scrying

at will: dancing lights, druidcraft, mending, spare the dying

7/day each: bane, create or destroy water, fog cloud, purify food and drink

5/day each: blindness/deafness, gust of wind, locate object, moonbeam, shatter

3/day each: bestow curse, dispel magic, plant growth, remove curse, telekinesis

1/day each: blight, contagion, dream

1/week each: geas, hallow

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the haugbui fails a saving throw it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Sepulchral Scrying (1/Day)
entries: An invisible magical eye is created under the haugbui's control, allowing it to watch its territory without leaving the burial mound. The eye travels at the speed of thought and can be up to 5 miles from the haugbui's location. The haugbui can see and hear as if it were standing at the eye's location, and it can use its innate spellcasting abilities as if it were at the eye's location. The eye can be noticed with a successful DC 18 Wisdom (Perception) check and can be dispelled as if it were 3rd-level spell. Spells that block other scrying spells work against Sepulchral Scrying as well. Unless dismissed by its creator or dispelled, lasts for up to 12 hours after its creation; only one can be created per 24-hour period.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the haugbui has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

trait.name: Turn Resistance
entries: The haugbui has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The haugbui makes two psychic claw attacks.

action.name: Psychic Claw
entries: Ranged Magical Attack: +10 to hit, range 40 ft., one target. Hit: 32 (6d8 + 5) psychic damage.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries:
the haugbui's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 18). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

constant: detect thoughts, invisibility, mage hand, scrying

at will: dancing lights, druidcraft, mending, spare the dying

7/day each: bane, create or destroy water, fog cloud, purify food and drink

5/day each: blindness/deafness, gust of wind, locate object, moonbeam, shatter

3/day each: bestow curse, dispel magic, plant growth, remove curse, telekinesis

1/day each: blight, contagion, dream

1/week each: geas, hallow

monster.name: Haugbui
languages: the languages it knew in life, telepathy 120 ft.

trait.name: Incorporeal Movement
entries: The haugbui can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.

trait.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the haugbui has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

trait.name: Turn Resistance
entries: The haugbui has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

trait.name: Undead Nature
entries: The hangbui doesn't require air, food, drink, or sleep.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The haugbui makes three Psychic Blast attacks. It can replace one attack with a use of Spellcasting.

action.name: Psychic Blast
entries: Melee or Ranged Spell Attack: +10 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (5d8 + 5) psychic damage.

action.name: Invisibility
entries: The haugbui magically turns invisible until it attacks or casts a spell, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the haugbui wears or carries is invisible with it.

action.name: Spellcasting
entries:
The haugbui casts one of the following spells, requiring no components and using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 18):
At will: dancing lights, mending, purify food and drink, spare the dying
3/day each: gust of wind, telekinesis
1/day each: dispel magic, remove curse

trait.name: Ancestral Spirits
entries: Three ghostly spirits haunt the giant. The spirits are incorporeal, remain within 10 feet of the giant at all times, and can't take actions. Each uses the giant's AC and saving throws, has 15 hp and can only be harmed by radiant damage. If an ancestral spirit is reduced to 0 hp, it disappears temporarily. Reduce the giant's AC by 1 and remove one trait granted by the spirits for each spirit that is driven off. Ancestral spirits can't be turned.

trait.name: Reckless
entries: At the start of its turn, the giant can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn. This trait is granted by the ancestral spirits.

trait.name: See Invisibility
entries: The giant can see invisible creatures and objects as if they were visible and can see into the Ethereal Plane. This trait is granted by the ancestral spirits.

trait.name: Steadfast
entries: The giant is immune to the charmed and frightened conditions. This trait is granted by the ancestral spirits.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant makes two greatclub attacks.

action.name: Greatclub
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Rock
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Keen Sight
entries: The hawk has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

action.name: Talons
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 slashing damage.

trait.name: Keen Sight
entries: The hawk has advantage on Perception checks that rely on sight.

action.name: Talons
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 slashing damage.

trait.name: Heightened Sight
entries: The hawk's Perception is 19 when perceiving by sight.

action.name: Talons
entries: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 3 (1d4+1) slashing damage.

trait.name: Heightened Sight
entries: The hawk's Perception is 19 when perceiving by sight.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The hawk has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the hawk's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

action.name: Beak
entries: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 4 (1d4+2) piercing damage.

trait.name: Cavalry Charge
entries: If the dragonborn moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature while mounted and then hits with a lance attack on the same turn, it can make a trample attack against that creature as a bonus action.

trait.name: Locked Saddle
entries: The dragonborn can't be knocked prone, dismounted, or moved against its will while mounted.

trait.name: Mounted Warrior
entries: The dragonborn is rarely seen without its giant lizard mount. The lizard wears custom scale mail that raises its Armor Class to 15. While the dragonborn is mounted, the giant lizard can't be charmed or frightened.

action.name: Lance
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d12 + 2) piercing damage.

action.name: Heavy Crossbow
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d10 + 1) piercing damage.

action.name: Trample (Mounted Only)
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

action.name: Fire Breath (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: The dragonborn breathes fire in a 15-foot cone. All creatures in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

trait.name: Keen Smell
entries: The hebi-doku has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

trait.name: Serpentine Mind
entries: The hebi-doku can magically command any snake within 120 feet of it, using a limited form of telepathy.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hebi-doku can use its Transfixing Rattle. It then makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its disabling sting, or two with its toxic spittle.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing plus 14 (4d6) poison damage.

action.name: Disabling Sting
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (3d4 + 5) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or be unable to use bonus actions and reactions until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Toxic Spittle
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 30/90 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (3d6) poison damage, and the target must make a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the target is paralyzed for 1 minute. On a success, the target is poisoned for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

action.name: Transfixing Rattle
entries: The hebi-doku rattles its tail at one creature it can see within 30 feet of it. The target must make a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be incapacitated and have its speed reduced to 0 until the end of its next turn.

trait.name: Cat Sneak
entries: While in dim light or darkness, the heggarna has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide. It can use this trait only while it is disguised as a cat.

trait.name: Dream Eating
entries:
As a bonus action, the heggarna can attach its lamprey-like maw to a sleeping creature. The target's Charisma score is reduced by 1d4 when the heggarna first attaches to it. The target's Charisma score is then reduced by 1 for each hour the heggarna stays attached. The target dies if this reduces its Charisma to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest at least 24 hours after the heggarna reduced its Charisma.

While attached, the heggarna fills the target's dreams with nightmares. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or it doesn't gain any benefit from its current rest. If the target succeeds on the saving throw by 5 or more, it immediately awakens.

The heggarna can detach itself by spending 5 feet of its movement. It does so after it reduces the target's Charisma by 8 or if the target dies.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) psychic damage.

action.name: Dream Rift (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The heggarna unleashes a barrage of psychic energy in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 7 (2d6) psychic damage and is incapacitated until the end of its next turn as it is bombarded with nightmarish images. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't incapacitated.

action.name: Illusory Appearance
entries:
The heggarna covers itself with a magical illusion that makes it look like a Tiny cat. The illusion ends if the heggarna takes a bonus action to end it or if the heggarna dies. The illusion ends immediately if the heggarna attacks or takes damage, but it doesn't end when the heggarna uses Dream Eating.

The changes wrought by this effect fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, the heggarna could appear to have fur, but someone touching it would feel its slippery flesh. Otherwise, a creature must take an action to visually inspect the illusion and succeed on a DC 15 Intelligence (Investigation) check to discern the heggarna is disguised.

trait.name: Innate Spellcasting (1/Day)
entries: The helashruu can innately cast gate, requiring no material components. Its innate spellcasting ability is Charisma.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The helashruu uses Trap Life if it can. It then makes four shard whip attacks.

action.name: Shard Whip
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) slashing damage.

action.name: Reflect Energy (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The helashruu releases stored energy in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw, taking 35 (10d6) damage of the most recent type dealt to the helashruu on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the helashruu hasn't taken damage within the past 1 minute, the damage type is force.

action.name: Trap Life (Recharge 6)
entries:
One creature of the helashruu's choice that is within 30 feet of the helashruu and that can see it must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or be trapped inside the helashruu's mirror. While trapped, the target is blinded and restrained, it has total cover against attacks and other effects outside the helashruu, and it takes 21 (6d6) force damage at the start of each of the helashruu's turns. The helashruu can have only one creature trapped at a time. A fragmented caricature of the trapped creature appears on the helashruu's surface while a creature is trapped inside it.

If the helashruu takes 30 or more bludgeoning or thunder damage on a single turn, the helashruu must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or release the creature, which falls prone in a space within 10 feet of the helashruu. If the helashruu dies, a trapped creature is immediately released into a space within 10 feet of the helashruu.

action.name: Teleport
entries: The helashruu magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.

action.name: Dimensional Hop (3/Day)
entries: The helashruu can transport itself to a different plane of existence. This works like the plane shift spell, except the helashruu can affect only itself and can't use this action to banish an unwilling creature to another plane.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting (1/Day)
headerEntries: The helashruu can innately cast gate, requiring no material components. Its innate spellcasting ability is Charisma.

monster.name: Hell Hound
languages: understands Infernal but can't speak it

trait.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
entries: The hound has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The hound has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hound's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.

action.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The hound exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

trait.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
entries: The hound has advantage on Perception checks that rely on hearing and smell.

trait.name: Lawful Evil
entries: The hound radiates a Lawful and Evil aura.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The hound has advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the hounds allies is within 5 feet of the creature and not incapacitated.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.

action.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The hound exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area makes a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw  taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save or half damage on a success.

trait.name: Pack Tactics
entries: The hound has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hound's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

trait.name: Prey Sense
entries: The hound can pinpoint, by scent, the location of Medium and smaller creatures within 30 feet of it.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hell hound makes two Bite attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 7 (1d8+3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.

action.name: Fire Breath (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The hound exhales fire in a 15foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 DEX save, taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

monster.name: Herald Of Blood

trait.name: Blood Armor
entries: The herald of blood takes no damage from the first attack against it each round and ignores any nondamaging effects of the attack.

trait.name: Gift of Blood
entries: As an action, the herald of blood can transform any fey, human, or goblin into a red hag, if the target willingly accepts this transformation.

trait.name: Grant Blood Rage
entries: As a bonus action, the herald of blood can grant a single living creature blood rage, giving it advantage on attacks for 3 rounds. At the end of this time, the target gains 1 level of exhaustion and suffers 13 (2d12) necrotic damage from blood loss.

trait.name: Humanoid Form
entries: A herald of blood can assume a humanoid form at will as a bonus action, and dismiss this form at will.

trait.name: Melting Touch
entries: When a herald of blood scores a critical hit or starts its turn with a foe grappled, it can dissolve one metal or wood item of its choosing in that foe's possession. A mundane item is destroyed automatically; a magical item survives if its owner makes a successful DC 17 Dexterity saving throw.

action.name: Engulfing Protoplasm
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (2d12 + 6) slashing damage and the target must make a successful DC 17 Dexterity saving throw or be grappled by the herald of blood (escape DC 16). While grappled this way, the creature takes 39 (6d12) acid damage at the start of each of the herald's turns. The herald can have any number of creatures grappled this way.

legendary.name: Move
entries: The herald of blood moves up to half its speed.

legendary.name: Call of Blood (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: Melee Weapon Attack. +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., all creatures in reach. Hit: 39 (6d12) necrotic damage and each target must make a successful DC 17 Constitution saving throw or gain 1 level of exhaustion.

legendary.name: Majesty of Ragnarok (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: The herald of blood emits a terrifying burst of eldritch power. All creatures within 100 feet and in direct line of sight of the herald take 32 (5d12) necrotic damage, gain 2 levels of exhaustion, and are permanently blinded. Targets that make a successful DC 15 Charisma saving throw are not blinded and gain only 1 level of exhaustion.

legendaryHeader: A herald of blood can take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the options below. Only one legendary action option can be used at a time and only at the end of another creature's turn. A herald of blood regains spent legendary actions at the start of its turn.

trait.name: Corrupting Touch
entries: A herald of darkness can destroy any wooden, leather, copper, iron, or paper object by touching it as a bonus action. A mundane item is destroyed automatically; a magical item survives if its owner makes a successful DC 16 Dexterity saving throw.

trait.name: Gift of Darkness
entries: A herald of darkness can transform any fey, human, or goblin into one of the shadow fey, if the target willingly accepts this transformation.

trait.name: Shadow Form
entries: A herald of darkness can become incorporeal as a shadow as a bonus action. In this form, it has a fly speed of 10 feet; it can enter and occupy spaces occupied by other creatures; it gains resistance to all nonmagical damage; it has advantage on physical saving throws; it can pass through any gap or opening; it can't attack, interact with physical objects, or speak. It can return to its corporeal form also as a bonus action.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The herald of darkness uses Majesty of the Abyss, if it is available, and makes one melee attack.

action.name: Embrace Darkness
entries: Melee Weapon Attack. +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., all creatures in reach. Hit: 6 (1d12) necrotic damage and targets are paralyzed until the start of the herald's next turn. Making a DC 17 Constitution saving throw negates the paralysis.

action.name: Majesty of the Abyss (Recharge 4-6)
entries: The herald of darkness emits a sinister burst of infernal power. All creatures within 30 feet and in direct line of sight of the herald take 19 (3d12) necrotic damage and must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw. Those who fail the saving throw are blinded for 2 rounds; those who succeed are frightened for 2 rounds.

action.name: Shadow Sword
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (2d12 + 5) slashing damage.

trait.name: Corrupting Aura
entries: The calm emotions spell instantly fails when cast within 60 feet of the herald. In addition, any creature that starts its turn within 30 feet of the herald must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or grow hostile. On its turn, a hostile creature must move to and make one attack against the nearest creature other than the herald. If no other creature is near enough to move to and attack, the hostile creature stalks off in a random direction, seeking a target for its hostility. At the start of each of the herald's turn, it chooses whether this aura is active.

trait.name: Magic Weapons
entries: The herald's weapon attacks are magical.

trait.name: Shapechanger
entries: The herald can use its action to polymorph into a Small or Medium humanoid it has seen, or back into its true form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.

trait.name: Innate Spellcasting
entries:
The herald's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 16). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: detect thoughts
3/day: charm person, fear, suggestion
1/day: modify memory, seeming

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The herald of slaughter makes three attacks: one with its gore and two with its cleaver. Alternatively, it can use Enkindle Hate twice. If it hits one target with Enkindle Hate twice using this action, the target must succeed on a DC 16 Charisma saving throw or use its reaction to immediately move up to half its speed and make one melee attack against a random target within range.

action.name: Enkindle Hate
entries: Ranged Spell Attack: +8 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (4d8) fire damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Gore
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.

action.name: Cleaver
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries:
The herald's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 16). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: detect thoughts
3/day: charm person, fear, suggestion
1/day: modify memory, seeming

monster.name: Herald of the Void

trait.name: Annihilating Form
entries: Any object that touches or hits the herald of the Void vaporizes. If the object is being worn or carried by a creature, the creature can make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw to prevent the object from being vaporized. If the object is magical, the creature has advantage on the saving throw. The herald can choose to not vaporize an object.

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the herald fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Zero-Dimensional
entries: The herald can move through any space without squeezing.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The herald makes two void claw attacks. Alternatively, it can use its Void Ray twice.

action.name: Void Claw
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) cold damage plus 4 (1d8) force damage.

action.name: Void Ray
entries: Ranged Spell Attack: +8 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d8) cold damage and 9 (2d8) force damage.

action.name: The Final Song (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The herald utters a melody of cosmic doom in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw, taking 27 (6d8) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. This melody doesn't affect creatures that understand Void Speech.

legendary.name: Move
entries: The herald flies up to half its flying speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

legendary.name: Void Claw (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The herald makes one void claw attack.

legendary.name: Discorporate (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The herald chooses up to two creatures it can see within 30 feet of it. Each target must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or become intangible until the end of its next turn. While intangible, the creature is incapacitated, drops whatever it's holding, and is unable to interact with physical objects. The creature is still visible and able to speak.

legendary.name: Song of Mighty Doom (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: The herald emits a cacophonous dirge praising the Void. Each creature other than the herald within 30 feet of the herald and that understands Void Speech gains 10 temporary hp.

legendaryHeader: The herald of the void can take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the options below. Only one legendary action option can be used at a time and only at the end of another creature’s turn. The herald regains spent legendary actions at the start of its turn.

trait.name: Blood Armor
entries: Each time a creature with blood hits the herald with a melee attack while within 10 feet of the herald, the creature takes 4 (1d8) necrotic damage, and the herald's AC increases by 1 until the end of its next turn. The herald's AC can't be increased to more than 20 from this trait.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The herald makes three Herald's Staff or Blood Bolt attacks, or it makes two Herald's Staff attacks and one Grasping Slam attack.

action.name: Herald's Staff
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 13 (3d8) necrotic damage.

action.name: Grasping Slam
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 17) if it is a Large or smaller creature. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained and takes 9 (2d8) necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns, and the herald can't use its Grasping Slam on another target.

action.name: Blood Bolt
entries: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (5d8 + 3) necrotic damage. If the target is a creature with blood, it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Call Blood (Recharge 5-6)
entries: Each creature with blood within 10 feet of the herald must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 45 (10d8) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The herald then gains temporary hp equal to the single highest amount of necrotic damage dealt. A creature that fails the saving throw by 5 or more also suffers one level of exhaustion.

trait.name: Made of Shadows (Shadow Form Only)
entries: The herald of darkness has resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage and can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. In addition, it can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

trait.name: Shadow's Sight
entries: Magical darkness doesn't impede the herald's darkvision.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The herald of darkness makes two Embrace Darkness or Shadow Sword attacks.

action.name: Embrace Darkness (Shadow Form Only)
entries: Melee Spell Attack: +7 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the herald's space. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) necrotic damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed until the end of its next turn.

action.name: Shadow Sword (Fiend Form Only)
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage.

action.name: Majesty of the Abyss (Recharge 5-6)
entries: The herald of darkness emits a sinister burst of infernal power. Each creature within 15 feet of the herald and that can see it must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature takes 27 (6d8) necrotic damage and is blinded for 1 minute. On a success, a creature takes half the damage and isn't blinded. A creature that fails the saving throw by 5 or more is also paralyzed until the end of its next turn. A blinded creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

trait.name: Herd-Hidden (Herd Animal Form Only)
entries: Has advantage on Dex (Stealth) and Cha (Deception) checks to blend into herd or convince those observing herd it is part of the herd.

trait.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
entries: Has advantage on Wis (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

trait.name: One of the Herd
entries: A domesticated herd animal such as a cow horse sheep or chicken that can see the herd skulker treats it as a member of the herd regardless of the form skulker takes. When such an animal sees a herd skulker attack or feed it becomes immune to herd skulker's One of the Herd for the next 24 hrs acting as it normally would when confronting a predator. Creatures immune to the charmed condition are immune to this.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, 5 ft., one target, 12 (2d8+3) piercing damage. If the target is a creature it must make DC 13 Str save or be knocked prone.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The hezrou has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Stench
entries: Any creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the hezrou must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of its next turn. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the hezrou's stench for 24 hours.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hezrou makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage.

action.name: Claws
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.

action.name: Variant: Summon Demon (1/Day)
entries:
The demon chooses what to summon and attempts a magical summoning.
A hezrou has a 30 percent chance of summoning 2d6 dretches or one hezrou.
A summoned demon appears in an unoccupied space within 60 feet of its summoner, acts as an ally of its summoner, and can't summon other demons. It remains for 1 minute, until it or its summoner dies, or until its summoner dismisses it as an action.

trait.name: Chaotic Evil
entries: The hezrou radiates a Chaotic and Evil aura.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The hezrou has advantage on saving throws against spells and magical effects.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hezrou makes one attack with its bite and one with its claws.

action.name: Bite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature  it is grappled (escape DC 15). Until this grapple ends  the target is restrained  and the hezrou can't bite another target.

action.name: Claws
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d8 + 4) slashing damage.

action.name: Swallow
entries: The hezrou makes a bite attack against a Medium or smaller creature it is grappling. If the attack hits and the hezrou has not swallowed another creature  the target is swallowed and the grapple ends. A swallowed creature has total cover from attacks from outside the hezrou  it is blinded and restrained  and it takes 17 (5d6) ongoing acid damage while swallowed.

action.name: If a swallowed creature deals 25 or more damage to the hezrou in a single turn, or if the hezrou dies, the hezrou vomits up the creature
Darkness
entries: Magical darkness spreads from a point within 30 feet  filling a 15-foot-radius sphere and spreading around corners. It remains for 1 minute  until the hezrou dismisses it  or until the hezrou uses this ability again. A creature with darkvision can't see through this darkness and nonmagical light can't illuminate it.

reaction.name: Stench (1/Day)
entries: When hit by a melee attack, the hezrou emits a cloud of foul-smelling poison gas in a 20-foot radius. Each creature in the area makes a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, a creature is poisoned for 1 minute. A creature can repeat this saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success

trait.name: Amphibious
entries: The hezrou can breathe air and water.

trait.name: Demonic Resilience
entries: The hezrou is resistant to cold, fire, and lightning damage. In addition, it is immune to poison damage and to the poisoned condition.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The hezrou has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

trait.name: Speak with Frogs and Toads
entries: The hezrou can communicate with frogs and toads as if they shared a language.

trait.name: Standing Leap
entries: The hezrou's long jump is up to 20 feet and its high jump is up to 10 feet, with or without a running start.

trait.name: Stench
entries: A creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the hezrou must succeed on a DC 16 CON save or be poisoned until the start of its next turn. On a success, the creature is immune to the hezrou's Stench for the next 24 hours.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The hezrou makes one Sticky Tongue attack, one Bite attack, and two Claw attacks.

action.name: Bite
entries: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 15 (2d10+4) piercing damage.

action.name: Claw
entries: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 17 (3d8+4) slashing damage.

action.name: Sticky Tongue
entries: _Melee Weapon Attack:_ +7 to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. _Hit:_ 11 (2d6+4) bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 16 STR save or be pulled up to 15 feet toward the hezrou.

monster.name: Hierophant Lich

trait.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
entries: If the lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

trait.name: Levitate
entries: As a bonus action, a hierophant lich can rise or descend vertically up to 20 feet and can remain suspended there. This trait works like the levitate spell, except there is no duration, and the lich doesn't need to concentrate to continue levitating each round.

trait.name: Rejuvenation
entries: If it has a sacred vessel, a destroyed hierophant lich gains a new body in 1d10 days, regaining all its hp and becoming active again. The new body appears within 5 feet of the vessel.

trait.name: Turn Resistance
entries: The hierophant lich has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.

trait.name: Spellcasting
entries:
The lich is an 9th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks). The lich has the following cleric spells prepared:
Cantrips (at will): guidance, mending, sacred flame, thaumaturgy
1st level (4 slots): command, detect magic, protection from evil and good, sanctuary
2nd level (3 slots): blindness/deafness, hold person, silence
3rd level (3 slots): animate dead, dispel magic, spirit guardians
4th level (3 slots): banishment, freedom of movement, guardian of faith
5th level (1 slot): flame strike

action.name: Unholy Smite
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d6 + 1) bludgeoning plus 9 (2d8) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed for 1 minute. The charmed target must defend the hierophant. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. An undead target that fails is charmed for 24 hours and can only repeat the saving throw once every 24 hours.

legendary.name: Cantrip
entries: The hierophant lich casts a cantrip.

legendary.name: Unholy Smite (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The heirophant lich uses its Unholy Smite.

legendary.name: Damnation (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The hierophant lich threatens one creature within 10 feet of it with eternal suffering. The target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a target's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the target is immune to the hierophant lich's Damnation for the next 24 hours.

legendaryHeader: The hierophant lich can take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the options below. Only one legendary action option can be used at a time and only at the end of another creature's turn. The lich regains spent legendary actions at the start of its turn.

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries:
The lich is an 9th-level spellcaster. Its spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 17, +9 to hit with spell attacks). The lich has the following cleric spells prepared:
Cantrips (at will): guidance, mending, sacred flame, thaumaturgy
1st level (4 slots): command, detect magic, protection from evil and good, sanctuary
2nd level (3 slots): blindness/deafness, hold person, silence
3rd level (3 slots): animate dead, dispel magic, spirit guardians
4th level (3 slots): banishment, freedom of movement, guardian of faith
5th level (1 slot): flame strike

action.name: Rapier
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage.

action.name: Ray of Frost (Cantrip; V, S)
entries: Ranged Spell Attack: +4 to hit, range 60 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d8) cold damage  and the targets Speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of the nobles next turn.

reaction.name: Parry
entries: If the noble is wielding a melee weapon and can see their attacker, they add 2 to their AC against one melee attack that would hit them.

trait.name: Spellcasting
entries:
The priest is an 11th level spellcaster. Their spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 15
 +7 to hit with spell attacks). They have the following cleric spells prepared:
 Cantrips (at will): light
 sacred flame
 thaumaturgy
 1st-level (4 slots): ceremony
 detect evil and good
 healing word
 2nd-level (3 slots): augury
 hold person
 zone of truth
 3rd-level (3 slots): daylight
 remove curse
 4th-level (3 slots): divination
 guardian of faith
 revivify
 5th-level (2 slots): flame strike
 greater restoration
 raise dead
 6th-level (1 slots): heal

action.name: Mace
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage. On a hit  the priest can expend a spell slot to deal 7 (2d6) radiant damage  plus an extra 3 (1d6) radiant damage for each level of the spell slot expended above 1st.

action.name: Sacred Flame (Cantrip; V, S)
entries: One creature the priest can see within 60 feet makes a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw  taking 13 (3d8) radiant damage on a failure. This spell ignores cover.

action.name: Hold Person (2nd-Level; V, S, M, Concentration)
entries: One humanoid the priest can see within 60 feet makes a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure  the target is paralyzed for 1 minute. The target repeats the saving throw at the end of each of its turns  ending the effect on a success.

action.name: Guardian of Faith (4th-Level; V)
entries: A Large  indistinct spectral guardian appears in an unoccupied space within 30 feet and remains for 8 hours. Creatures of the priests choice that move to a space within 10 feet of the guardian for the first time on a turn make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw  taking 20 radiant or necrotic damage (high priests choice) on a failed save or half damage on a success. The spell ends when the guardian has dealt 60 total damage.

action.name: Flame Strike (5th-Level; V, S, M)
entries: A column of divine flame fills a 10-foot-radius  40-foot-high cylinder within 60 feet. Creatures in the area make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw  taking 14 (4d6) fire damage and 14 (4d6) radiant damage on a failure or half damage on a success.

trait.name: Unarmored Defense
entries: The pugilists AC equals 10 + their Dexterity modifier + their Wisdom modifier.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The pugilist attacks three times with their fists.

action.name: Fists
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Grab
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage  and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends  the pugilist can't grapple a different target.

action.name: Pin
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one grappled creature. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage  and the target is restrained until the grapple ends.

action.name: Body Slam
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one grappled creature. Hit: 20 (5d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage  and the grapple ends.

reaction.name: Opportune Jab
entries: If a creature attempts to grapple the pugilist, the pugilist attacks that creature with their fists.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant makes two greatclub attacks.

action.name: Greatclub
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Rock
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.

trait.name: Gullible
entries: The giant makes Insight checks with disadvantage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant attacks twice with its greatclub.

action.name: Greatclub
entries: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature  it makes a DC 16 Strength saving throw  falling prone on a failure.

action.name: Rock
entries: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (6d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature  it makes a DC 16 Strength saving throw  falling prone on a failure. In lieu of a rock  the giant can throw a grappled Medium or smaller creature up to 30 feet. On a hit  the target and the thrown creature both take 15 (3d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage. On a miss  only the thrown creature takes the damage. The thrown creature falls prone in an unoccupied space 5 feet from the target.

action.name: Greatclub Sweep (1/Day, While Bloodied)
entries: Each creature within 10 feet makes a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw. On a failure  a creature takes 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage  is pushed 10 feet away from the giant  and falls prone.

entries: The giant makes Insight checks with disadvantage.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The giant attacks twice with its greatclub.

In lieu of a rock  the giant can throw a grappled Medium or smaller creature up to 30 feet. On a hit  the target and the thrown creature both take 15 (3d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage. On a miss  only the thrown creature takes the damage. The thrown creature falls prone in an unoccupied space 5 feet from the target.
